scope.description: Food, nutrition, restaurant/catering, PAE/PAIP, canasta, and food-security contracts matched to the 1,122 municipality hunger-risk frame.

limitations: These are audit leads, not proof of corruption.
SECOP city fields can be missing or recorded as No Definido; unmapped contracts are excluded from municipal scoring.
National or department-level food contracts may benefit municipalities without naming them in SECOP city fields.
Named centro-poblado hits are exact text matches against DANE DIVIPOLA populated-center names; generic names should be verified in the original contract.
The relationship score combines hunger need and procurement risk; it should be used to prioritize review, not to rank guilt.
